title: Umami Malaysian Tagliatelle Braise
description: This show-off dish features umami-rich tagliatelle braised in a flavorful Malay-inspired sauce with tender vegetables and meat, perfect for dinner.

ingredients.name: Carrots, peeled and sliced into rounds
Fish Sauce (Kecapi Putih or Kicap Putih)

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add shallots, carrots, and celery. Sauté until vegetables are soft.
Fold in ground meat and cook until browned on all sides.
Stir in tomato paste, soy sauce, fish sauce, coconut milk, and papaya (if using).
Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let the mixture reduce slightly. Add kaffir lime leaves and let them infuse for about 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Stir in the chopped noodles and continue to cook until all liquid is absorbed and the sauce coats evenly over the noodles.
Remove from heat, garnish with fresh herbs like coriander or mint (optional), serve hot.
